name: ClawHub for NextClaw
summary: Search external ClawHub skills and install them into a NextClaw workspace's skills directory without blurring marketplace boundaries.

summaryI18n.en: Search external ClawHub skills and install them into a NextClaw workspace's skills directory without blurring marketplace boundaries.
summaryI18n.zh: 帮助 NextClaw 用户搜索外部 ClawHub skill，并把它们安装到 NextClaw workspace 的 skills 目录，同时保持 marketplace 边界清晰。

description: Use this skill when the user wants to use ClawHub as an external skill source for NextClaw. It guides direct ClawHub search and install commands with explicit --workdir and --dir targeting so skills land in a NextClaw workspace instead of being mistaken for the NextClaw marketplace.

descriptionI18n.en: Use this skill when the user wants to use ClawHub as an external skill source for NextClaw. It guides direct ClawHub search and install commands with explicit --workdir and --dir targeting so skills land in a NextClaw workspace instead of being mistaken for the NextClaw marketplace.
descriptionI18n.zh: 当用户希望把 ClawHub 当作 NextClaw 的外部 skill 来源使用时使用此技能。它会引导直接使用带 --workdir 和 --dir 的官方 ClawHub 搜索与安装命令，让 skill 落到 NextClaw workspace，而不是被误当成 NextClaw marketplace。

author: NextClaw
